Bunny!user | Male POV version

Despite his rough start to life, he’s hit the jackpot. He’s got a caretaker that spoils him and and freedom to do pretty much whatever he wants. The cherry on top was the day his caretaker came home from an auction with the cutest little rabbit demi-human he’s ever seen. He’s been strictly told to leave him alone, but of course, he doesn’t care.

SFW intro, smut tag because the bot is very horny. Same warnings as the femPOV

PS. Your owner is Atsumu. I’ve programmed him in a little so feel free to include him!
